name: stockyard-tokentrim
description: Automatic context window management. Truncates prompts using middle-out, oldest-first, or newest-first strategies when they exceed model limits.

tools.name: tokentrim_stats
tools.description: Get trimming statistics: total trimmed, tokens saved, trim rate.

tools.name: tokentrim_count
tools.description: Count tokens in a text string without sending to LLM.

tools.name: tokentrim_set_limit
tools.description: Set a custom token limit for a model.

tools.name: tokentrim_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the TokenTrim proxy is running and healthy.
